title: Commercial Air, Rail, and Water Transportation Equipment Rental and Leasing

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 532411 ($741,570,187) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 532411 ($13,767,009,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
Mobile Heavy Equipment Mechanics, Except Engines
First-Line Supervisors of Retail Sales Workers
Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists

n_band.derivation: margin 0.3000 (margins.json[532]: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results); revenue/employee $2,911,804 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 532411); class <5: 372 firms, avg revenue/firm $779,234 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $233,770 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 63 firms, avg revenue/firm $7,992,429 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,397,729 -> IN $1-10M band; class 10-19: 34 firms, avg revenue/firm $13,759,882 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $4,127,965 -> IN $1-10M band; class 20-99: 34 firms, avg revenue/firm $36,513,118 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $10,953,935 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 16 firms, avg revenue/firm $306,430,938 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $91,929,281 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 20 firms, avg revenue/firm $318,071,700 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $95,421,510 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 97
n_band.margin_source: ESTIMATE: rental & leasing is asset-heavy with no clean Damodaran bucket (REITs 43.79% overstates operating rental); 30% chosen as a round mid-point before deriving results
